Croatia’s Defense Minister Ivan Anušić responded to Aleksandar Vučić, rejecting claims that a Croatia–Kosovo–Albania alliance threatens Serbia.

He said the cooperation promotes stability and peace.

Anušić stressed that Croatia, as a sovereign NATO and EU member, will not be dictated to by anyone.

data.body:
Maybe my problem is my lineart 
Or maybe my style or my burnout

I think my two biggest hangups on humans are the nose and the brow/forehead area.
I'm so used to snouts that are uniform to a species but humans have so many varying shapes and I keep getting an uncanny valley feeling with my human art
